title: Temach #8547
definition:
Tamah or Thamah = "laughter"

 1) a head of a family of temple slaves who returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Tamah or Thamah = "laughter"

 1) a head of a family of temple slaves who returned from exile with
    Zerubbabel

    NASB:  head of a postexilic family
